name: Maple Nut Bars/Pillsbury
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 13x9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, 1/4 cup brown sugar, 2 tablespoons margarine, and egg. Mix at low speed until crumbly. Stir in 1/4 cup chopped nuts. Press into the bottom of the greased pan and bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. In a small bowl, beat 2 eggs until foamy. Add the reserved cake mix, 1/4 cup brown sugar, corn syrup, 3 tablespoons margarine, and maple extract. Beat at low speed until well-mixed.
5. Pour over the crust and sprinkle with 1/2 cup chopped nuts.
6. Return to oven and bake for 15 to 25 minutes or until golden brown (center will be soft).
7. Cool completely before cutting into bars. Makes about 36 bars.
